{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193223F58EA4A0179F4442CE7F"}"},"total":39296},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7209848965888656184","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说是好看的 剧情是好看的 人物塑造也是很成功的 就是...这文炸出了好多边太 尤其是触手出来的那个瞬间 飞出来的苦茶子好多[快哭了] 砸到我了[快哭了][快哭了][快哭了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1678673907,"group_id":"7195050600722074680","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"偶尔喜欢做科普君的缘","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7j5Gk5ULVMkzaIuUlKXA64Q0U/vbM5JTmo3Cvuq6a2X","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/791c8e9d5e85477f988602a799b9142e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704623&x-signature=wCIqi3LW9lAzbzbmk6J%2BHsERWy0%3D","user_id":"3518907631272109","user_name":"缘缘不圆啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3518907631272109","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7195050600722074680","book_info":{"abstract":"实体书已上架，出版名：[神之陨落]
（非人，恐怖怪物，慎入）
殷修在规则小镇生活了六年。
正常玩家进来都循规蹈矩刷副本，为了存活忙碌，只有殷修天天待在小镇不出去，不刷副本，不沾诡怪，每天打鱼晒网，甚至开始养老。
小镇的诡怪们也盯了他六年，每天都咬牙切齿，业绩刷了那么久，唯独没刷到过他。天天看着他在跟前晃悠，却对这个熟背规则的人一点办法都没有。
几天后，小镇大雨，又来了一批新人，一个被塞入殷修屋子做舍友的神秘男人当晚就搞定了小镇诡怪六年都搞不定的事——把殷修拖入了规则副本。
当晚，小镇诡怪聚众狂欢：好耶！终于把那个摸鱼养老人送走了！
同时，副本诡怪开始哀嚎：谁把六年前那个杀穿副本的男人拉进来的？！我们当年好不容易才把他赶出去的啊！！！
殷修进入副本后兴致缺缺，提着刀看了看周围：一成不变，没新意，走了，速通回去养老。
众副本诡怪长舒一口气，刚准备半场开香槟，一排扭曲血红的字忽地出现在了殷修面前。
：你看我有新意吗？
黏腻的寒意瞬间降临到了整个副本，诡怪、玩家无一不开始恐慌。
“它”出来了。
——
满级大佬回归旧本虐菜是常事啊。
杀穿副本后就养老很奇怪吗？
修身养性，喂个邪神也正常吧？
看我干嘛？我的攻略可不兴用啊。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/796c292dcdc49e2cc73228fdc3dd510d","author":"白桃呜呜龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7195050600722074680","book_name":"顶级玩家杀疯副本，拐跑邪神","book_short_name":"引神陨落","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"14.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7195052290946892291","read_count":"148995","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1093342"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.7","serial_count":"491","tags":"双男主,现代,穿越,直播,大佬,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df202f0178f85a591b2608584b76a620~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363143&x-signature=4nrxCyJ8FAFQctT7mX88ZRlj%2FL4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4112613945905822","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.3424863e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193223F58EA4A0179F4442CE7F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"r 看我干嘛？我的攻略可不兴用啊。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/796c292dcdc49e2cc73228fdc3dd510d","author":"白桃呜呜龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7195050600722074680","book_name":"顶级玩家杀疯副本，拐跑邪神","book_short_name":"引神陨落","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"14.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7195052290946892291","read_count":"148995","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1093342"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.7","serial_count":"491","tags":"双男主,现代,穿越,直播,大佬,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df202f0178f85a591b2608584b76a620~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363143&x-signature=4nrxCyJ8FAFQctT7mX88ZRlj%2FL4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4112613945905822","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1645697e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193223F58EA4A0179F4442CE7F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":275,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11645,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":317541},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7256119720445117221","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"已经沦为触手控了，本来以为会很涩结果居然出乎意料的纯情，但是好甜啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！！！（脑袋炸成花）
真的很喜欢两个人的互动，呜呜呜呜杀神和邪神的cp香爆了好吧！
有时候一个人上网看小说也挺无助的，胰岛素没有人给我递，我只能自己在床上蠕动缓解心里的激动了！真的好喜欢好喜欢！！！一看就停不下来了！！！环环相扣，剧情很紧凑，逻辑也很通顺，除了修哥的过去还有小叶子那里虐了点（不过修哥也在慢慢转变，也有了很多人……呃，还有诡陪伴，小叶子我现在看到两百多章看样子应该是可以恢复的），其他很甜！超甜！爆甜！
拜托，会主动要亲亲的男朋友超级加分的好吧！！！修哥请满足他！！！呜呜呜呜，太甜了太甜了！！！
修哥真的不知道该怎么形容，冷静理智又疯批嗜血（某些时候），不过在我看来就是很……可爱，嗯，超级可爱！！！怎么会有这么可爱的男孩子啊啊啊啊啊啊（不是什么奶萌娇气包但是不知道为什么就是觉得好可爱！！！一定是修哥的个人魅力！！！修门永存！！！）
最后那个小触手，就是说话不利索的那个切片体，呜呜呜呜好可爱啊，会因为男朋友亲亲而激动得尖叫，太可爱了！！！
如果你也喜欢这本小说，那你一定是一个有品位的人，如果你不喜欢也请你礼貌地离开，不要随意贬低别人的劳动成果（不要影响太太码字的心情啊啊啊啊！！！不然我顺着网线爬过去剃秃你！！！）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689447648,"group_id":"7195050600722074680","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人看书挺杂的，可能会分错类，将就看吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/UfY704JdOeVrh435xnyTsWmE/jtOAm6BN6hjPKRg4p","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0751852887fc4517a467996a1a20e8c7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709516&x-signature=698qfON2GReNothW37yKUM77EtU%3D","user_id":"3434515267853709","user_name":"久菜核子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3434515267853709","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7195050600722074680","book_info":{"abstract":"实体书已上架，出版名：[神之陨落]

满级大佬回归旧本虐菜是常事啊。
